displayGuidance: Use these on a homepage testimonials slider + a dedicated reviews strip on service/city pages. For Review structured data, only mark up reviews genuinely shown on the page. Add a 'Read all 159 reviews on Google' link to the GBP. Rotate city-mentioning reviews onto the matching city pages (e.g., Weston reviews on /weston/) for local relevance.

reviews.name: Sunny M
reviews.text: Great service and very reasonable prices. Needed quick cleanup of unwanted items piled up in garage. Cesar was prompt to reply and made himself available at short notice. Cleaned up the space before leaving. Would reuse and recommend.

reviews.name: Lay
reviews.text: Spoke with Cesar who met with me the same day and gave a great, detailed price. So nice and professional. They came the next day on time and took care of everything.

reviews.name: Carissa Weeks
reviews.text: Called for a quote as my husband and I just bought a home and were renovating. His service was superior — arrived within 15 minutes and the work was excellent.

reviews.name: Luis Avalos
reviews.text: On-time delivery, fair pricing, and willingness to work with my pickup date. Knowing they're veteran-owned makes it even better. Absolutely recommend.

reviews.name: Bill Cardinali
reviews.text: Hired them to empty out a storage unit. Came out the same day and got it done quickly. Cesar was extremely professional and the price was reasonable.

reviews.name: Helena Sicher-Smith
reviews.text: Dumpster delivered on a Friday evening within 30 minutes of my call. Very helpful choosing the right size. Reasonable prices, polite and knowledgeable.

reviews.name: Kiana
reviews.text: New to the neighborhood with loads of moving boxes and packing paper. Reached out to Cesar and they came out same day and removed the clutter from the move.

reviews.name: Shawn Riggans
reviews.text: Called at 10pm the day before a hurricane made landfall and received the best service. On time and upfront about price. Would recommend for any job big or small.

reviews.name: Christina Ramos
reviews.text: Cesar made getting rid of a broken refrigerator worry-free. Quickly assessed how to get it out of my patio door without any damage. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Mindy Smith
reviews.text: We had to clear out my dad's apartment after he passed. No problem he couldn't solve — neat, smart, and efficient. Brought his own shop vac.

reviews.name: Eric Brotherhood
reviews.text: Responded immediately, showed up on time, and removed a 5-seat hot tub in 30 minutes. Great team, great price. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Noah Katz
reviews.text: Used them to haul away an old king-size mattress. Excellent service at a reasonable price. Would definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Danielle Greenberg
reviews.text: Wonderful crew — punctual, kind, fast and strong. They worked smart and I really appreciate that. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Kathy
reviews.text: Cesar and team were professional, reasonably priced, and did a fast, efficient job with my condo clear-out. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Francine Caba
reviews.text: Cesar was honest, accommodating and professional. His team got the office-furniture cleanout done in a superbly organized, efficient and timely manner.

reviews.name: Nick difrancesco
reviews.text: Used Cesar and Sunshine State over a dozen times. 100% prompt, professional and reliable. Always there when you need it.

reviews.name: Diana Garcia-Gomez
reviews.text: After being stood up by two other companies we called them. Arrived the same day even though it was late and started immediately. Prices very reasonable. I noticed the owner sweeping up after — they truly go above and beyond.

reviews.name: Nicole Lopez
reviews.text: First time using this company. Very prompt, great customer service, and very reasonable pricing. If you need junk removal, look no further.

reviews.name: Xiomy Negron
reviews.text: Cesar is great and very personable. Great communication, smooth and easy process. I'd recommend them to anyone in Broward County.

reviews.name: Maria A. Hernandez
reviews.text: This company is excellent. Cesar has great customer service and so do his employees. Honest, best price, work done to perfection, arrived on time.

reviews.name: Helene H.
reviews.text: I'd give 10 stars if I could. He treated us and our property as if we were family. On time, polite, and careful. His truck is amazingly clean. I cannot recommend Cesar enough.

reviews.name: Lexi F.
reviews.text: The best! Same-day, after-hours haul out. As South Florida realtors and house flippers, a reliable removal company is a must — these guys are officially our go-to.
